Metadata.SimplifiedName: Great American Cross-Country Road Race, The
Metadata.SourceFile: Great American Cross-Country Road Race The (Activision) [no1541].tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3E00 "THEGREATAMERICANCROSSCOUNTRYROADRACE-3E00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Great American Cross-Country Road Race, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is from the disk version
